channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea Weighs Phased Hormuz Support After US Talks
item.description: South Korea is reviewing a phased contribution to efforts to ensure safe navigation through the Strait of Hormuz, signaling support steps short of military participation as the US seeks allies for the Iran mission.

item.title: 💰 Pentagon: US War in Iran Has Cost $29 Billion
item.description: A senior Pentagon official said the US war in Iran has cost $29 billion so far, an increase of $4 billion from estimates late last month, as lawmakers query costs and Trump renews strike threats.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 US and China Agree on Opposing Hormuz Shipping Tolls
item.description: Senior US and Chinese officials agree that no country should exact shipping tolls in the Strait of Hormuz, a sign both countries are trying to find common ground on pressuring Iran to give up control of the vital waterway.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Bond Vigilantes Exact Price on Government as Yields Hit 28-Year High
item.description: Britain's long-dated government borrowing costs have surged to their highest since 1998 as concern over potential leadership change weakens fiscal discipline, with 30-year gilt yields hitting 5.81%.

item.title: 📉 G7 Long Bond Stress Intensifies Amid Rising Borrowing Costs
item.description: The relentless rise in long-term government borrowing costs shows no sign of abating, with stress building in world markets as stock markets defy gravity.

item.title: 🇧🇷 BRICS foreign ministers meet in Delhi with Iran war casting shadow
item.description: The US-Israeli war on Iran is set to dominate discussions at the BRICS foreign ministers meeting in New Delhi, testing the blocs ability to reach a unified position. China Foreign Minister Wang Yi will skip the meeting due to scheduling conflicts with Trump visit.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China warns ready to crush Taiwan independence bid before Trump summit
item.description: China reiterated its strong opposition to US arms sales to Taiwan and declared its capability to crush any independence bid is unbreakable, just ahead of President Trumps arrival in Beijing for a high-stakes summit with Xi Jinping.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Nvidia CEO joins Trump China trip amid AI chip tensions
item.description: President Donald Trump added Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to his delegation of business leaders heading to China, aiming to open up China to US business. The move comes amid tensions over AI chip exports.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah leader urges Lebanon to quit direct Israel talks
item.description: Hezbollah leader Naim Kassem called on Lebanons government to withdraw from direct talks with Israel in Washington, saying they benefit Israel and that Hezbollah weapons are an internal affair. Lebanon reported 380 killed since April 17 ceasefire.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia successfully tested new Sarmat strategic nuclear missile
item.description: Russia said it successfully tested its new Sarmat strategic nuclear missile, which significantly changes the balance of nuclear deterrence forces in world geopolitics according to State Duma deputy Denis Kravchenko.

item.title: 🇨🇳 US and China in unprecedented cooperation against scam centres in Dubai
item.description: The United States and China launched an unprecedented joint operation targeting scam centres in Dubai that have defrauded victims of billions. The cooperation comes despite ongoing tensions between the two powers.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea signals phased support for US-led Hormuz mission
item.description: South Korea signaled it would provide phased support for the US-led mission in the Strait of Hormuz after a ship attack raised concerns about regional security.

item.title: 🇦🇺 Australia to deploy surveillance aircraft to support Hormuz mission
item.description: Australia announced it will deploy surveillance aircraft to support the international mission protecting shipping in the Strait of Hormuz amid continued tensions with Iran.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel strikes Lebanon, 380 killed since ceasefire
item.description: Israel hammered south Lebanon with strikes ahead of Washington talks, as Beirut reported 380 people killed in Israeli attacks since an April 17 ceasefire took effect. Hezbollah chief vowed to turn the battlefield into hell for Israeli forces.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Kuwait arrests four IRGC-affiliated people trying to enter by sea
item.description: Kuwait arrested four people affiliated with Irans Revolutionary Guards attempting to infiltrate the Gulf state by sea, the interior ministry said.

item.title: ⚔️ Islamic State claims deadly attack on Syrian government forces
item.description: Islamic State claimed responsibility for an attack in eastern Syria that killed two Syrian army soldiers, the jihadist groups first deadly operation against the Syrian government since February.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK borrowing costs rise, sterling slumps amid Starmer doubts
item.description: UK borrowing costs rose in March with sterling slumping as political uncertainty over Prime Minister Keir Starmers leadership weighs on markets.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia launched covert attacks on Iran as regional war widened
item.description: Saudi Arabia launched covert attacks on Iranian soil as the regional war widened, marking the first time the kingdom is known to have directly carried out military action on Iranian territory.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran now defines Strait of Hormuz as far larger zone
item.description: Iran has expanded its definition of the Strait of Hormuz into a vast operational area far wider than before the Iran war, a senior IRGC Navy officer said, signaling heightened threat perceptions for international shipping.

item.title: 🏛️ Trump and Xi will seek good harvest at Temple of Heaven summit
item.description: Chinese emperors once prayed for bumper crops at the Hall of Prayer for Good Harvests. Trump and Xi will seek their own harvest in high-stakes talks on trade, Iran, and technology.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Defense Secretary joins Trump China trip in rare diplomatic move
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth joined President Trumps trip to China in a rare diplomatic move highlighting the security dimensions of the summit.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Sirens warn of suspected Hezbollah drone attack in north
item.description: Sirens sounded in northern Israel warning of a suspected Hezbollah drone attack from Lebanon amid ongoing cross-border tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian drones strike port infrastructure in Russias Krasnodar Krai
item.description: Ukrainian drones reportedly struck port infrastructure in Russias Krasnodar Krai, continuing attacks on Russian logistics.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Palestine Action members convicted for UK raid on Israeli arms firm
item.description: Members of Palestine Action were convicted in the UK for a raid on an Israeli arms firm, with potential terrorism sentencing implications.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump says end of war in Ukraine is very close
item.description: President Donald Trump said the end of the war in Ukraine is very close, expressing optimism about peace negotiations.
